plan.plan_summary: This 12-week plan focuses on building a strong foundation in Generative AI, AI Agents, and Evaluation, allocating the majority of the 10-hour weekly budget to these core skills. It also incorporates Data Pipelines and BigQuery learning into spare hours to complement existing adjacent skills.
